title: Lead Investment Banker at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
